title: That Old Black Magic: Hermy and Bass

startPoint.en: Speak to Lady Grey in the City of Um's bandstand about her drummer.
startPoint.es: Habla con Lady Grey en el quiosco de música de la City of Um sobre su percusionista.

quests.title: That Old Black Magic: My One and Only Lute

items.name: Animated drumsticks
items.display: Animated drumsticks (may obtain during the quest)

kills: Multiple kills of Hermod, the Spirit of War (level 732)

text.en: Talk to Lady Grey about the drummer.
text.es: Habla con Lady Grey sobre el percusionista.

text.en: Kill Hermod, the Spirit of War until you receive animated drumsticks.
text.es: Mata a Hermod, the Spirit of War hasta que recibas las animated drumsticks.

text.en: Requires 65 Necromancy and completion of The Spirit of War.
text.es: Requiere 65 de Nigromancia y haber completado The Spirit of War.

text.en: Talk to the The Spirit of Rhythm.
text.es: Habla con The Spirit of Rhythm.

text.en: Unequip items from both hand slots and talk to Ed.
text.es: Quítate los objetos de ambas ranuras de las manos y habla con Ed.

chatOptions: 1 Take a boat out onto the lake.

text.en: He's in the boat rental shop east of the northernmost docks.
text.es: Está en la tienda de alquiler de barcas al este de los muelles más al norte.

text.en: Manifest the animated drumsticks and a splash will appear at the location of a lost drum. Refer to the location maps below.
text.es: Manifiesta las animated drumsticks y aparecerá un chapoteo en la ubicación de un tambor perdido. Consulta los mapas de ubicación a continuación.

text.en: Continue to manifest the animated drumsticks until you have found all four drums.
text.es: Sigue manifestando las animated drumsticks hasta que hayas encontrado los cuatro tambores.

text.en: Return to the bandstand and talk to the The Spirit of Rhythm.
text.es: Vuelve al quiosco de música y habla con The Spirit of Rhythm.
